verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’ll not ask you Lord to lighten up my burden I don’t mind the trials on earth that I go through But I’ve done my best down here Lord so I’m asking For a little spot in Heaven close to You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Precious Lord forget me not don’t pass me by For I know there’s others worthier than I But if you can Lord here’s what I’d have You to do Save a little spot in Heaven close to You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: At the Altar years ago I learned to love you As the years went by the love in my heart grew I’ve done my best on earth Lord so I am asking For a little spot in Heaven close to You
